testcase.name: test_02_create_user_with_employee_record
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_user_employee_sync.py:112: in test_02_create_user_with_employee_record assert employee["role"] == "sales_executive" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'role'

testcase.name: test_03_update_user_deactivate_syncs_to_employee_terminated

failure.message: AssertionError: Termination date should be set assert None is not None + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd6303201540>('termination_date') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd6303201540> = {'annual_leave_balance': 30.0, 'bank_details': None, 'company_email': 'test.sync.1771794141@clt-academy.com', 'confirmation_date': None, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_user_employee_sync.py:167: in test_03_update_user_deactivate_syncs_to_employee_terminated assert employee.get("termination_date") is not None, "Termination date should be set" E AssertionError: Termination date should be set E assert None is not None E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd6303201540>('termination_date') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd6303201540> = {'annual_leave_balance': 30.0, 'bank_details': None, 'company_email': 'test.sync.1771794141@clt-academy.com', 'confirmation_date': None, ...}.get

testcase.name: test_06_sync_role_change
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_user_employee_sync.py:292: in test_06_sync_role_change assert employee["role"] == new_role, f"Employee role should be '{new_role}', got: {employee['role']}" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'role'

testcase.name: test_09_delete_user_terminates_employee

failure.message: AssertionError: Termination date should be set assert None is not None + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd6302da3740>('termination_date') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd6302da3740> = {'annual_leave_balance': 30.0, 'bank_details': None, 'company_email': 'test.delete.1771794143@clt-academy.com', 'confirmation_date': None, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_user_employee_sync.py:432: in test_09_delete_user_terminates_employee assert employee.get("termination_date") is not None, "Termination date should be set" E AssertionError: Termination date should be set E assert None is not None E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd6302da3740>('termination_date') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd6302da3740> = {'annual_leave_balance': 30.0, 'bank_details': None, 'company_email': 'test.delete.1771794143@clt-academy.com', 'confirmation_date': None, ...}.get
